title: Calm Eligibility File Row
description: One row of a Calm Business or Calm Health SFTP eligibility CSV uploaded to /inbound/eligibility/ on sftp.ws.calm.com.

unique_identifier.description: Work email, employee ID, or partner-controlled stable identifier used to redeem the Calm benefit.

segment_1.description: Optional segmentation column for demographic reporting (e.g., region).

segment_2.description: Optional segmentation column for demographic reporting (e.g., department).

segment_3.description: Optional segmentation column for demographic reporting (e.g., business unit).
